text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, a little bit... I had a long night yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I went to a store that has all kinds of cool stuff
and bought a disco ball for my house.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, I developed a severe case of disco
fever and ended up dancing all night...
